_warning: HAND-AUTHORED build provenance. This file records WHICH MINDS built each phase. A sync script that touches this file is a bug.
_why_this_file_exists: The atlas refuses to let a machine-derived pin look human-confirmed. The same honesty applies to the code: which AI model built each phase, under which harness, is a fact worth keeping — and worth showing. Recorded here for the same reason every pin carries a confidence.

entries.title: Bounty progressions, presence 18->47, status timelines, the master filter, poneglyphs, the Fish-Man Island dive, and twelve signature islands

usage.note: Measured from the Claude Code session transcript over this run's window (761 assistant turns). Includes cached input, like the Codex counter beside it: a workload snapshot, not an invoice. Reasoning tokens are not itemised by this harness. HONEST DISCREPANCY: the transcript labels every turn in this window claude-opus-4-8 while the runtime identified itself as Fable 5 — recorded as measured rather than reconciled, and worth Shawn's correction.

usage.note: Measured from the Claude Code session transcript over this phase's window (310 assistant turns). Includes cached input, like the Codex counter beside it.
